name: COSON Co., Ltd.
summary: COSON Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells cosmetic products primarily in South Korea. It offers skin care products, such as solubilization, masks, cleansing, emulsification, and sun care products; and emulsion, LIP, and powder make up products. The company was formerly known as 3H Co., Ltd. and changed its name to COSON Co., Ltd. in December 2012. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
